nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_notes!~/.*MINI.*/ and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_model!="MK2SMM" and printer_notes!~/.*MINI.*/ and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_notes!~/.*MINI.*/ and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_model!="MK2SMM" and printer_notes!~/.*MINI.*/ and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
data.start_filament_gcode: "M900 K0 ; Filament gcode"

data.compatible_printers_condition: nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_notes!~/.*MINI.*/ and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_model!="MK2SMM" and printer_notes!~/.*MINI.*/ and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_notes!~/.*MINI.*/ and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material

nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_model!="MK2SMM" and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and printer_notes=~/.*PRINTER_MODEL_MK(2|2.5).*/ and ! (printer_notes=~/.*PRINTER_MODEL_MK2.5.*/ and single_extruder_multi_material)
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_model!="MK2SMM" and printer_notes!~/.*MINI.*/ and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
nozzle_diameter[0]==0.8 and printer_notes!~/.*PG.*/ and ! single_extruder_multi_material
